rulings.Case Title: WINSTON S NICHOLS ET AL VS. ASBESTOS COMPANIES
rulings.Calendar Matter: Notice Of Motion And Plaintiffs Motion To Specially Set A Trial Date Pursuant To C.C.P. 36(A) And (D); Memorandum Of Points And Authorities In Support Thereof; Declaration; [Proposed] Order
rulings.Rulings: On Asbestos Law and Motion Calendar for Friday, January 12, 2018 in Department 503, Line 1. Plaintiffs' motion to specially set a trial date pursuant to C.C.P. § 36(a) and (d) is continued to January 18, 2018. The Asbestos Department does not hear motions on Fridays. Additionally, plaintiffs failed to lodge a courtesy copy of their moving papers as required by Local Rule 2.7(B) and they must lodge one with the Court no later than January 12, 2018 at 4:00p.m. = (503/CML)
